metadata.description: Single-plugin marketplace for lifeline — the auditable, coverage-honest dev lifecycle that runs anywhere and hands off to humans.

plugins.name: lifeline
plugins.description: Full dev lifecycle (spec → plan → build → review → test → merge, + debug lane) with coverage→smoke seeding, reviewer/QA handoff docs, auditable artifact trail, and a portable core that runs on Claude Code (FULL tier), Cursor (FULL tier on ≥ 2.4, documented fallbacks otherwise), and any harness with a one-file adapter.
